name: Notify Technology Corp.
summary: Notify Technology Corporation provides wireless mobility solutions and services. Its products include NotifyMDM, which provides a single console to manage and secure corporate and individual mobile devices regardless of operating system, carrier, and email platform to IT administrators; and NotifySync, a device application that offers secure, real-time, and wireless synchronisation solutions to various email platforms that support ActiveSync for BlackBerry users. The company's products also comprise NotifyLink, an enterprise solution that offers secure, real-time, and wireless synchronisation to any email platform that support ActiveSync for mobile workers. It serves financial services, government, healthcare, higher education, primary and secondary education, and manufacturing sectors. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in San Jose, California.
